name: Layered Cheesecake Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Brownie Layer: Beat the butter in a bowl for 1 minute until smooth. Gradually beat in the sugar and then the eggs, one at a time. Add the vanilla, salt, and melted semi-sweet chocolate. Quickly beat in the flour just until blended. Scrape this mixture evenly into the prepared pan that was foil lined and sprayed with a non-stick spray.
2. Cheese Cake Layer: Take the cream cheese and blend well with the butter. Add the sugar and the flour, then add the eggs, beating until very fluffy. Add the sour cream and vanilla. Pour this over the top of the brownie mixture.
3. Place into the oven for 45 minutes.
4. When cooled, top with a fresh berry sauce or a rich chocolate Ganache.
